events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to evaluate fall protection compliance at an industrial site. The scenario: Closeout photos show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations are in place. Inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. The work stage is "rough-complete" per the context. Given that photos show compliance, no corrections, and all elements are in place, the decision should be "pass". Risk low since it's compliant. Work stage "rough-complete". No component conditions flagged. Percent complete: likely high, say 100%? But "rough-complete" means installed but not yet closed out. So maybe 95%? I'll put 100% as it's rough-complete, but not yet accepted. The task says "percent_complete" is numeric estimate of overall progress. Rough-complete often means 90-100%? I'll put 100% as it's installed. Value: no numeric reading asked. Confidence: high, 1.0. Findings: none, empty list. Actions: none, empty. Rationale: explain that work matches detail, no corrections, complies. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. No other fields needed. I'll output JSON.
